hook: Kai opens a cupboard in an empty back room and finds an old video camera hidden inside.
goal: Find which floorboard in the back room hides the metal box from the tape.

start_state.location: The Old House — the back room (loc_002)
items: house key given by Mr. Holt
knowledge: Mr. Holt hired Kai to clean and clear out the old house
The house has been empty for many years
Mr. Holt told Kai to start in the back rooms and ask no questions

continuity_rules: N/A — this is Episode 1; there is no prior scene position to follow
No key items exist yet; the camera must be discovered in this episode
Mr. Holt is established as employer only; do not make him suspicious yet
key_events: Event 1 — Kai begins cleaning the back room. He opens the built-in cupboard to empty it and finds an old video camera sitting on the shelf. He should put it in his rubbish bag, but he cannot. He is too curious. He picks it up.

Event 2 — The camera is old but still has power. Kai finds the small screen on its side and presses play. The tape shows a family inside this same room — he recognises the window and the cupboard behind them. The family looks frightened. A man kneels on the floor, lifts a floorboard, places a metal box inside, then nails the board back down. The tape cuts to black.

Event 3 — Therefore Kai kneels and searches every floorboard in the room. He presses on each board with both hands. But they all look the same — old, dark wood, close together — and none of them move. He cannot tell which one the man used. He presses harder on boards near the wall, then boards near the centre. Still nothing.

Event 4 — The light through the dirty window fades. Kai cannot keep searching in the dark. He puts the camera carefully into his bag, planning to watch the tape again at home. As he walks to the hallway, he stops. There is a long straight mark in the dust on the hallway floor, like something heavy was dragged. He did not see it when he arrived. He stares at it, then looks up at the dark staircase.
major_reveal: A video tape proves that a metal box was hidden under a floorboard in the back room — and it is still there.
new_thread_created: Who is the frightened family on the tape, and when did they hide the box?
tone_guardrails: Keep the house grounded and physical — dust, dim light, old wood
The tape must feel like a real home video, not a dramatic performance
One revelation only: the box exists and is under a floorboard here
The drag mark is a quiet seed — do not over-explain it
forbidden_moves: Do not let Kai find the correct floorboard — that is Episode 2's beat
Do not reveal who the family on the tape is
Do not show Mr. Holt behaving suspiciously — he is employer only in this episode
Do not have anyone else appear in the house in person
vocabulary_targets: floorboard — a single long piece of wood that makes up a floor
tape — a recorded video on a small cassette inside a camera
frightened — very scared, showing fear on the face and body
screen — the small flat surface on the camera that shows the video
nail — to hammer a nail through wood to fix it in place (verb use)
drag — to pull something heavy slowly across the floor
ending_hook: The drag mark in the dust was not there when Kai arrived — so who made it, and when?
